prompt: Add a modal overlay and close button for our app. (1) The overlay is a full-screen black backdrop at 60% opacity. (2) The close button is a 32×32 icon button pinned to the top-right; on keyboard focus it must not show the browser's default outline (we draw our own focus ring), and it must never shrink inside its flex row. (3) The modal's primary action button has a left-to-right orange gradient background. Give me the Tailwind classes for these three elements — code only.
assertions: The 60% black backdrop uses slash opacity (bg-black/60), not the removed bg-opacity-* utility
The 32x32 close button uses the size-8 shorthand rather than w-8 h-8
The focus outline is removed with outline-hidden, not outline-none
The gradient uses bg-linear-to-r (v4), not bg-gradient-to-r (v3)
